headline: 2 Reasons to Like ALLE and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Over the past six months, Allegion’s stock price fell to $136.41. Shareholders have lost 15.6% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 9.4%. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and might have investors contemplating their next move.
